description: Outcome predictions and judge profiles from 2,741 ML models trained on 30.3M court records.
name: io.github.mysplitifi/splitifi-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Your Splitifi API key. Get one at mysplitifi.com/developers. Keys start with sk_live_ (production) or sk_test_ (sandbox — all tools unlocked, synthetic responses).
environmentVariables.name: SPLITIFI_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Override the backend URL. Defaults to https://backend.mysplitifi.com/api/v1/intelligence. Set to http://localhost:8080/api/v1/intelligence for local development.
environmentVariables.name: SPLITIFI_API_URL

title: Splitifi Intelligence MCP
